title: 3 Legal Considerations and Policies for Data Hub
body_text:
3	Legal Considerations and Policies for Data Hub
3.1	Agreements for Data Hub
To participate in the Data Hub platform, your financial institution must enter into an agreement with Central 1. Contact Client Support Services or your senior account executive for more information. See Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
3.2	Internal Controls and Data Hub User Management
Your financial institution is responsible for Data Hub security practices and internal controls. Policies relating to the use of Data Hub can include, but arenât limited to, the following:
Ensuring that Data Hub users have their own unique IDs and donât share IDs
Prohibiting the use of multiple user IDs for an employee
Identifying and requesting deactivation of inactive Data Hub users
Limiting Data Hub access to employees who require it to complete their job requirements
END
